title: rosa × collina var. platyphylla
intro: Rosa × collina var. platyphylla, also known as the fragrant wild rose, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. The medicinal properties of Rosa × collina var. platyphylla include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Rosa × collina var. platyphylla can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried flower, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
